description.value: Aura faint conjuration and transmutation; CL 3rd; Slot armor; Price 3,605 gp; Weight 20 lbs. DESCRIPTION This +1 studded leather is styled like a captain’s jacket with long, sturdy leather tails that cover the wearer’s thighs, and it is festooned with steel studs crafted to look like gold coins. The wearer can use abundant ammunition and purify food and drink each once per day. CONSTRUCTION REQUIREMENTS Feats Craft Magic Arms and Armor; Spells abundant ammunition, purify food and drink; Price 1,890 gp
